tasks.instruction: Go to the Incidents section, activate the Open only filter, and verify the summary says 5 active incidents.
Go to the Incidents section, activate the Critical only filter, and verify the summary says 2 critical incidents.
Open the Releases section and verify the blocked train mentions Blocked by data-contract mismatch.
Open Settings, change the execution mode to Explorer, click Save preferences, and verify the confirmation text Preferences saved is visible.
